protein_name: Component of the histone deacetylase NuRD complex which participates in the remodeling of chromatin by deacetylating histones. Belongs to the SNF2/RAD54 helicase family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: centrosome; cerebellar granule cell to Purkinje cell synapse; chromatin; chromosome, telomeric region; cytoplasm; nucleoplasm; nucleus; NuRD complex; RNA polymerase II transcription regulator complex; site of DNA damage
